scenario_title: tracking fungal spread on a vineyard
scenario_description: Plant Disease Diagnosis: tracking fungal spread on a vineyard

turns.text: I took this photo of my grapevine leaves earlier this week. They look healthy, but I'm worried about possible disease.
turns.image_description: Healthy grapevine leaves with uniform green color, no spots visible. Sunlight filtering through the canopy.

turns.text: The leaves appear healthy with no visible signs of infection. I don't see any spots or discoloration. Have you noticed any changes recently?
Here's a newer photo. I noticed some yellow spots on a couple of leaves. There's also a bird in the background.
turns.image_description: Two leaves show yellow spots. A bird perched on a branch, unrelated to disease.

turns.text: I see the yellow spots on the leaves now—this could be an early sign of infection. The bird in the background doesn't seem related. Have you seen any further changes since this photo?
The spots have gotten worse. They're merged into larger brown patches now. There's a ladybug on one of the leaves in this latest shot.
turns.image_description: Spots have merged into larger brown patches. A ladybug on a leaf, unrelated to disease progression.

turns.text: The brown patches suggest the infection is progressing. The ladybug appears to be unrelated. Let me know if you'd like to compare this with your earliest photo.
Here's the most recent image. Most leaves have brown patches with black spores visible. There's also a new healthy leaf in the background.
turns.image_description: Most leaves show brown patches with black spores visible. A new healthy leaf in the background, unrelated to infection spread.

turns.text:
What stage of fungal infection is visible in the final image?

B) Advanced fungal stage with spores
A) Healthy leaves with no infection
C) Early yellow spot stage
D) Intermediate brown patch stage

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: Turn 1 established baseline health. Turn 2 identified initial yellow spots. Turn 3 showed progression to brown patches. Turn 7 revealed black spores confirming advanced stage, while ignoring distractors (bird, ladybug, new leaf).
ground_truth.key_difficulty: The progression from spots to spores requires tracking incremental changes, as a single image would only show the final state without showing its development.

_meta.scenario: Plant Disease Diagnosis: tracking fungal spread on a vineyard
